zh.lifeSummary: 當Layton Cunningham Sr於1764年1月18日出生在美國紐約州奧瑟格米爾福德米爾福德時，他的父親Thomas Cunningham22歲，母親Lucy Hutchinson25歲。他於1789年1月18日與Phebe Way在美國康乃狄克州利其費爾德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1839年3月23日在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年75歲，埋葬在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Layton Cunningham Sr于1764年1月18日出生在美国纽约州奧瑟格米爾福德米爾福德时，他的父亲Thomas Cunningham22岁，母亲Lucy Hutchinson25岁。他于1789年1月18日与Phebe Way在美国康涅狄格州利其費爾德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1839年3月23日在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年75岁，埋葬在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Layton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Leighton  , from a variant spelling of the surname reflecting the pronunciation.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Historical Boundaries 1791: Otsego, New York, United States
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.
Historical Boundaries: 1821: Erie, New York, United States

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

en.lifeSummary: When Layton Cunningham Sr was born on 18 January 1764, in Milford, Milford, Otsego, New York, United States, his father, Thomas Cunningham, was 22 and his mother, Lucy Hutchinson, was 25. He married Phebe Way on 18 January 1789, in Litchfield, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 March 1839, in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Layton Cunningham Sr est né le 18 janvier 1764, à Milford, Milford, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Cunningham, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lucy Hutchinson, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Phebe Way le 18 janvier 1789, à Litchfield, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1839, à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Layton Cunningham Sr am 18. Januar 1764 in Milford, Milford, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cunningham 22 und seine Mutter Lucy Hutchinson 25. Er hat am 18. Januar 1789 in Litchfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Phebe Way geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. März 1839 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Layton Cunningham Sr è nato il il 18 gennaio 1764 nel Milford, Milford, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Thomas Cunningham, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Hutchinson, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Phebe Way il 18 gennaio 1789, nel Litchfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Layton Cunningham Srが1764年1月18日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴミルフォードミルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Cunninghamは22歳，母Lucy Hutchinsonは25歳であった。1789年1月18日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州リトチフィールドでPhebe Wayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1839年3月23日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Layton Cunningham Sr(이)가 1764년 1월 18일 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 미퍼드 미퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cunningham(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Hutchinson(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1789년 1월 18일 미국 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드에서 Phebe Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1839년 3월 23일 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Layton Cunningham Sr nasceu em 18 de janeiro de 1764, em Milford, Milford, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Cunningham, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Hutchinson, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Phebe Way em 18 de janeiro de 1789, em Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1839, em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Layton Cunningham Sr родился 18 января 1764 г. в местности милфорд, милфорд, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Thomas Cunningham было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy Hutchinson, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Phebe Way 18 января 1789 г. в местности личфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 марта 1839 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.18 January 1764–23 March 1839: 18 de enero de 1764–23 de marzo de 1839

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Layton Cunningham Sr nació el 18 de enero de 1764, en Milford, Milford, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Cunningham, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lucy Hutchinson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Phebe Way el 18 de enero de 1789, en Litchfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1839, en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
